narrative:
Pierpont Twp township has 658 registered voters, with 58.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.3 percentage points.
